title: Better Foliage
description: I made Minecraft foliage look better by giving plants variation and other tweaks
body:
**This resource pack makes Minecraft's foliage better by giving several plants variants, making wheat taller, and lowering the sides of grass-like blocks.**

![Better Foliage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea5239c93a81a8db819fe0ae0b73e62c96ba3ce3.jpeg)

**Variants for:**
  - Poppy
  - Dandelion
  - Cornflower
  - Oxeye Daisy
  - Allium
  - Red Tulip
  - Orange Tulip
  - Pink Tulip
  - White Tulip
  - Azure Bluet
  - Lily Of The Valley
  - Wither Rose
  - Brown Mushroom
  - Red Mushroom
  - Warped Fungus
  - Crimson Fungus

**Taller Wheat**

**Lower sides of:**
  - Grass Block
  - Snowy Grass Block
  - Podzol
  - Mycelium
  - Dirt Path
  - Crimson Nylium
  - Warped Nylium
